caption: A man with short dark hair is seen from the chest up, speaking against a dark backdrop illuminated by purple streaks of light. He wears a light blue button-down shirt under a grey blazer and has a thin tan microphone headset wrapped around his ear and cheek. He is captured in a series of slight movements as he talks, shifting his facial expressions and posture. Initially, he is looking toward his right with a subtle smile. As time progresses, his mouth opens further in a laugh or active speech, and his head tilts slightly. His shoulders shift minimally as he gestures or speaks, maintaining a relaxed yet engaged demeanor. No other people, objects, or text are visible in the scene.
